creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looking at https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/page.cgi?id=fields.html#bug_status
it does not describe "New", "Open", or "In Progress" when our deployment
of Bugzilla does have those.

"IN_PROGRESS" vs "In Progress" is close, but not the same, and the others
are simply missing.

(I believe there are other differences on that page, but those were the
ones I ran into.)
